memoryArtifacts.headline: Helie of Burgundy (1080-1141)
memoryArtifacts.description:
Helie of Burgundy (c. 1080 – 28 February 1141) was the daughter of Eudes I and Sibylla of Burgundy.

In June 1095, she married Bertrand of Toulouse, as his second wife. The two had one son,

zh.lifeSummary: 當Hélène de Bourgogne於大約1080年11月出生在法國布格-福朗-可特艾o-達迪喬時，她的父親Eudes Ier dit Borel duc de Bourgogne22歲，母親Sibylle de Barcelone45歲。她於1095年與Bertran de Trípol在法國哈帕格-亞登芒內布格結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1141年2月28日在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易薩特a特爾--薩斯諾斯享年60歲，埋葬在法國曼恩。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hélène de Bourgogne于大约1080年11月出生在法国布格-福朗-可特艾o-達迪喬时，她的父亲Eudes Ier dit Borel duc de Bourgogne22岁，母亲Sibylle de Barcelone45岁。她于1095年与Bertran de Trípol在法国哈帕格-亞登芒內布格结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1141年2月28日在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易薩特a特爾--薩斯諾斯享年60岁，埋葬在法国曼恩。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bourgogne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bourgoin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphee, Alyre, Andre, Armand, Aurore, Celina, Emile, Gilberte, Jacques, Laurent, Lucienne, Olivier.

variant of Bourgouin (and, in North America, an altered form of this), a habitational name for someone from Burgundy (Old French Bourgogne), a region of eastern France having Dijon as its center. The area was invaded by the Burgundii, an ancient Germanic tribe from whom it takes its name, in about AD 480. The duchy of Burgundy, created in 877 by Charles II, King of the Western Franks, was extremely powerful in the later Middle Ages, especially under Philip the Bold (1342–1404; duke from 1363). Compare Bourgoyne and Bourguignon .

nameMeanings.name: Hélène
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Helen  , now in fairly frequent use in the English-speaking world, usually without the accents.

variants.name: Helena
meanings: form of   Helen  , used also in Germany, the Netherlands, Scandinavia, and Eastern Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Hélène de Bourgogne was born about November 1080, in Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, her father, Eudes Ier dit Borel duc de Bourgogne, was 22 and her mother, Sibylle de Barcelone, was 45. She married Bertran de Trípol in 1095, in Bourgogne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 28 February 1141, in Neufchâtel-en-Saosnois, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France, at the age of 60, and was buried in Maine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hélène de Bourgogne est née environ novembre 1080, à Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, son père, Eudes Ier dit Borel duc de Bourgogne, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Sibylle de Barcelone, avait 45 ans. Elle a épousé Bertran de Trípol en 1095, à Bourgogne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 28 février 1141, à Neufchâtel-en-Saosnois, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Maine, France.

de.Neufchâtel-en-Saosnois, Sarthe, Pays de: Neufchâtel-en-Saosnois, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Hélène de Bourgogne um November 1080 in Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Eudes Ier dit Borel duc de Bourgogne 22 und ihre Mutter Sibylle de Barcelone 45. Sie hat 1095 in Bourgogne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich Bertran de Trípol geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 28. Februar 1141 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Neufchâtel-en-Saosnois, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich und wurde in Maine, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hélène de Bourgogne è nata il circa novembre 1080 nel Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, sua padre, Eudes Ier dit Borel duc de Bourgogne, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Sibylle de Barcelone, aveva 45 anni. Lei sposato Bertran de Trípol nel 1095, nel Bourgogne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 28 febbraio 1141, nel Neufchâtel-en-Saosnois, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Francia, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolta a Maine, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Hélène de Bourgogneが約1080年11月にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeクoテ-ド'オルディジョンで生まれた時，父Eudes Ier dit Borel duc de Bourgogneは22歳，母Sibylle de Barceloneは45歳であった。1095年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンマルンボウルゴグンでBertran de Trípolと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1141年2月28日にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーサルスネウフチaテル-エン-サオスノイスで60歳で死去し，フランスメインにて埋葬された。

ko.Neufchâtel-en-Saosnois, Sarthe, Pays de: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 사르테 니우프cha텔--사스노이스
ko.lifeSummary: Hélène de Bourgogne(이)가 대략 1080년 11월 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e co테-드'어 디조에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Eudes Ier dit Borel duc de Bourgogne(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sibylle de Barcelone(은)는 45세였다. 그녀는 1095년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 마니 부르고그니에서 Bertran de Trípol(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1141년 2월 28일 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 사르테 니우프cha텔--사스노이스에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 맹에 묻혔다.

pt.Neufchâtel-en-Saosnois, Sarthe, Pays de: Neufchâtel-en-Saosnois, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, França
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hélène de Bourgogne nasceu aproximadamente novembro de 1080, em Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, seu pai, Eudes Ier dit Borel duc de Bourgogne, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Sibylle de Barcelone, tinha 45 anos. Ela casou-se com Bertran de Trípol em 1095, em Bourgogne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 28 de fevereiro de 1141, em Neufchâtel-en-Saosnois, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, França, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Maine, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hélène de Bourgogne родилась около ноябрь 1080 г. в местности диджон, кoте-д'ор, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция, её отцу по имени Eudes Ier dit Borel duc de Bourgogne было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Sibylle de Barcelone, 45. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Bertran de Trípol в 1095 г. в местности бургогн, марн, чампагне-арденн, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 28 февраля 1141 г. в местности неуфчaтел-ен-саосноис, сарт, пеис де ла лоир, Франция в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности меин, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hélène de Bourgogne nació aproximadamente noviembre de 1080, en Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, su papá, Eudes Ier dit Borel duc de Bourgogne, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Sibylle de Barcelone, tenía 45 años. Se casó con Bertran de Trípol en 1095, en Bourgogne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 28 de febrero de 1141, en Neufchâtel-en-Saosnois, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Francia, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Maine, Francia.
